app.name: StepSprint
app.tagline: Track steps. Compete with your team. Build habits that stick.

hint.login: Enter your email and password to sign in.
hint.register: Create an account to join a step challenge.
hint.setup: Your account was created before passwords were required. Please set a password to continue.

links.toRegister: Don't have an account? Sign up
links.toLogin: Already have an account? Sign in

errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address (e.g. you@example.com).
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.passwordNeedsLetter: Password must contain at least one letter.
errors.passwordNeedsNumber: Password must contain at least one number.
errors.emailNotVerified: Verify your email before signing in. Check your inbox for a link from StepSprint (and spam).

afterRegister.title: Check your email
afterRegister.resendPrompt: No message yet? Try resending the verification email.

verifyEmailActions.resendDone: If this address has an account that still needs verifying, another email has been sent.

verifyEmail.title: Confirm your email
verifyEmail.success: Your email is verified. You can sign in.
verifyEmail.failed: This link is invalid or has expired.
verifyEmail.invalidLink: This verification link is missing details. Ask for a new link from sign in.

integrations.title: Fitness sync
integrations.subtitle: Link your wearable or tracker so steps flow into StepSprint. Apple Watch uses a safe token and iPhone Shortcuts; Fitbit, Google Fit, and Garmin use sign-in when your administrator enables them.
integrations.summaryLinked: Automatic sync or a linked tracker is enabled for your account.
integrations.summaryNotLinked: Nothing is syncing automatically yet. That is okay — manual entries always count.
integrations.trackersSectionHint: Tap Connect and sign in with the provider, then Sync today whenever you want the latest totals in this challenge. Not configured means the server does not yet have OAuth credentials for that brand.
integrations.oauthAdminHint: Your StepSprint host must add OAuth credentials for this integration before Connect appears here.
integrations.noChallenge: Select an active challenge in the header to configure sync.
integrations.syncResultNoData: {{name}} returned no step data for this range — make sure your watch synced to the provider for those days, then try again.
integrations.syncResultOutOfWindow: {{name}} returned {{skipped}} day(s), but they all fell outside this challenge's window — pick a date inside the challenge or wait until those days fall inside it.
integrations.syncResultUpToDate: {{name}}: already up to date — refreshed {{updated}} day(s) with the latest totals.
integrations.notEnrolledInChallenge: You are not enrolled in this challenge yet, so bulk CSV import is disabled. Ask an admin for an invite or use Apple token setup if you only need to prepare a Shortcut first.

csv.intro: Paste JSON in the same shape the API expects: an object with challengeId and a rows array (date as YYYY-MM-DD, steps as a number). Up to 500 rows per request.
csv.invalidJson: This is not valid JSON. Fix the text and try again.
csv.invalidShape: JSON must include challengeId and a non-empty rows array.
csv.challengeMismatch: The challengeId in your JSON must match the challenge selected in the header.
csv.constraintsBody: Each date must fall inside this challenge window. Import is blocked if the challenge is locked. Manual Submit and Apple Shortcuts remain available when bulk import cannot run.

appleHealth.introOptional: Optional — use this if you want steps sent automatically from your iPhone. You can always enter totals manually on the Submit page instead.
appleHealth.introShortcut: Use an iOS Shortcut to send your Apple Health daily step total to StepSprint (HealthKit cannot be read from this website directly). Generate a token, then configure the Shortcut to POST to StepSprint.
appleHealth.challengeTimezoneHint: Use YYYY-MM-DD dates for calendar days in this challenge's time zone ({{timezone}}), matching what you see on the Submit page.
appleHealth.batchBackfillHint: To backfill several days, send one request with a "rows" array (up to 31 days). StepSprint keeps the highest value if the same day appears more than once.
appleHealth.lastSyncToChallenge: Last Apple Health sync to this challenge: {{datetime}}.
appleHealth.tokenCreated: Token created. Copy it now — it will not be shown again.
appleHealth.shortcutStep1: Open the Shortcuts app on your iPhone and tap + to create a new shortcut.
appleHealth.shortcutStep2: Add Find Health Samples (or Get Health Sample). Set Type to Steps and choose a period that covers the full calendar day you are submitting (from the start of that day through the end of that day), so the result reflects your whole day including Apple Watch and iPhone where Health merges sources.
appleHealth.shortcutStep3: If you have many samples, add Calculate Statistics with Function set to Sum. If that total still differs from the Steps value in the Health app for that day, adjust your query (for example group by day or refine sources) until the shortcut matches the daily total you expect.
appleHealth.shortcutStep4: Add Format Date on the chosen day. Use format yyyy-MM-dd.
appleHealth.shortcutStep6: Optionally add an Automation so the shortcut runs at the end of each day.
appleHealth.apiReferenceIntro: POST to {{url}} with header Authorization: Bearer <your-token>:
appleHealth.curlTestIntro: Run this in Terminal, Git Bash, or WSL to verify your token and API URL. Edit the date, steps, or token if needed. A "401" means the token is wrong or revoked; use a token you just generated or copy from your password manager.

syncDate.modeLabel: How much to pull from your watch
syncDate.label: Date to pull from your watch
syncDate.hint: Defaults to today. Pick an earlier day to backfill steps from your watch — the date must fall inside this challenge.
syncDate.rangeHint: Will pull {{days}} day(s): {{start}} to {{end}} (clamped to this challenge).
syncDate.rangeHintEmpty: No days fall inside this challenge yet — try a single day instead.

home.title: Participant Home
home.welcome: Welcome back! You've signed in successfully.
home.notEnrolled: You are not enrolled in this challenge yet.
home.emptyState: No summary yet. Submit your first steps to get started!
home.devicesFitnessLinked: A tracker or automatic sync is linked to your account.
home.devicesFitnessNotLinked: No wearable sync linked yet — optional; add one on Devices.

streakToast.title: {{days}}-day streak!
streakToast.body: You're on fire. Keep it up!

notifications.dailyReminder: Remind me to log steps (Web Push when enabled, plus email when the server has email configured)
notifications.enabled: Push reminders enabled on this device.

submit.title: Submit steps
submit.manualIntro: Enter your step count below for any day in this challenge. Typing your total here works whether or not you connect a fitness sync.
submit.manualHintNoIntegration: No fitness sync is linked to your account yet — that is fine. Manual entries count the same as synced steps.
submit.lastAppleHealthSync: Last Apple Health sync for this challenge: {{datetime}}.
submit.noChallengeSelected: Choose an active challenge before submitting steps.

validation.futureDate: Cannot submit steps for a future date.

weeklyLeaderboard.title: Weekly Top Steppers
weeklyLeaderboard.noChallengeSelected: Select a challenge to view the leaderboard.
weeklyLeaderboard.noEntries: No entries yet for this week.

weekPicker.pickDate: Pick a date to select its week

forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.hint: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.successMessage: If an account with that email exists, a password reset link has been sent. Check your email (or server console in dev mode).

errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.

resetPassword.invalidMessage: This password reset link is invalid or incomplete.
resetPassword.title: Set new password
resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been reset. You can now sign in with your new password.

errors.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.needsLetter: Password must contain at least one letter.
errors.needsNumber: Password must contain at least one number.

invite.title: Accepting invite
invite.alreadyHaveAccountHint: If you already had an account, your session stays active. Others can finish signing up from the Login page.

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.message: The app hit an unexpected error. You can try again, or reload the page if the problem persists.

admin.title: Admin console
admin.noAccess: You do not have admin access.

invite.hintExpiry: The link expires in 7 days. The participant opens it to join and sign in.
invite.clipboardUnavailable: Copy failed. Select the URL and copy it manually.

analytics.reEngagement: Previously active, now quiet {{days}}+ days: {{count}} participants (simple churn-risk signal).
analytics.trendAria: Bar chart of submission counts per day
analytics.emptyTrend: No submissions yet on this timeline.
analytics.selectChallenge: Select a challenge to view analytics.

cohort.intro: Benchmark engagement across every challenge (sorted by start date).
cohort.empty: No challenges yet. Create one to see cohort metrics.

activityGrid.intro: Participant rows and calendar-day columns for the selected week (within this challenge). Uses the challenge timezone.
activityGrid.weekHint: Choose the ISO week to inspect (same week state as Weekly Top Steppers).
activityGrid.emptyWeek: No challenge days fall in this ISO week.
activityGrid.selectChallenge: Select a challenge to load the grid.
activityGrid.loadError: Could not load the activity grid.

exports.hint: CSV exports open against the StepSprint API host. Stay logged in; your browser sends your session cookie to the API origin.
exports.selectChallengeFirstLink: Select a challenge above to enable export links.

confirm.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this submission? ({{user}} · {{date}} · {{steps}} steps) This cannot be undone.

feedback.inviteCreated: Invite link created. Share it with the participant.
feedback.selectChallengeAndEmail: Select a challenge and enter email.

teamStandings.title: Team Leaderboard
teamStandings.emptyAdmin: No team standings yet. Add participants and assign teams to get started.
teamStandings.emptyParticipant: No team standings yet. Log steps to contribute, or ask your admin to assign teams.

cookieConsent.title: Cookie and analytics choices
cookieConsent.body: We use essential cookies for sign-in. If you accept, we also load optional product analytics to improve StepSprint.
